reference: Hello Doctor, I have a wheezing problem and shortness of breath when I have a cold. I noticed that I also have a dust allergy. Day by day, my problem is increasing. Now I have to take Levolin inhaler three times a day. Is there any way to control my problem?
text: Hello doctor, I have a wheezing problem and shortness of breath when I have a cold. I notice that I also have a dust allergy. Day by day, my problem is increasing. Now I have to take levolat inhaler three times a day. Is there any way to control my problem?
